children.name: Calumma

children.description: Calumma amber, commonly known as the Amber Mountain chameleon, is a species of chameleons endemic to Antsiranana Province, Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma ambreense
children.description: Calumma ambreense is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma andringitraense
children.description: Calumma andringitraense is a species of chameleon endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma crypticum
children.description: Calumma crypticum, commonly known as the cryptic chameleon or blue-legged chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma fallax
children.description: Calumma fallax, the deceptive chameleon or short-nosed deceptive chameleon is a species of chameleon endemic to eastern Madagascar, where its type locality is the Ikongo forest.

children.name: Calumma furcifer
children.description: Calumma furcifer, the "fork-nosed" chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar, in the western Indian Ocean.

children.name: Calumma gallus
children.description: The lance-nosed chameleon (Calumma gallus), also known as a blade chameleon, is endemic to eastern Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma glawi
children.description: Calumma glawi is a species of chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Calumma juliae
children.description: Calumma juliae is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma linotum
children.description: Calumma linotum, commonly known as the blue-nosed chameleon, is a chameleon species endemic to northern Madagascar, and common in the forests of Nosy Be.

children.name: Calumma malthe

children.description: Calumma peltierorum, Peltier's chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma tarzan
children.description: Calumma tarzan, also known commonly as the Tarzan chameleon or Tarzan's chameleon, is a species of lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Calumma tsaratananense
children.description: Calumma tsaratananense, the Tsaratanana chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.name: Calumma tsycorne
children.description: Calumma tsycorne, the blunt-nosed chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.description: Calumma uetzi, Uetz's soft-nosed chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Madagascar.

children.name: Chamaeleo

children.name: Chamaeleo africanus
children.description: Category:Taxa named by Josephus Nicolaus Laurenti.

children.name: Chamaeleo anchietae
children.description: Chamaeleo anchietae, the double-scaled chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Angola, Democratic Republic of the Congo and Tanzania.

children.name: Chamaeleo bavaricus
children.description: Chamaeleo bavaricus — a species in the genus Chamaeleo, family Chamaeleonidae. Also known as chameleons.

children.name: Chamaeleo calcaricarens
children.description: Chamaeleo calcaricarens is a species of chameleon found in Ethiopia, Eritrea, Djibouti, and Somalia.

children.name: Chamaeleo calyptratus
children.description: Category:Taxa named by André Marie Constant Duméril.

children.name: Chamaeleo chamaeleon
children.description: Category:Animal taxa named by Carl Linnaeus.

children.description: Category:Taxa named by Edward Hallowell (herpetologist).

children.name: Chamaeleo monachus
children.description: The Socotran chameleon (Chamaeleo monachus) is a species of chameleon endemic to the island of Socotra.

children.name: Chamaeleo necasi
children.description: Chamaeleo necasi, also known commmonly as Necas's chameleon or Necas' chameleon, is a species of lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Chamaeleo senegalensis
children.description: Category:Taxa named by François Marie Daudin.

children.name: Bradypodion
children.description: Bradypodion — a genus of chameleons in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Bradypodion caeruleogula
children.description: Bradypodion caeruleogula, the Dhlinza dwarf chameleon, Eshowe dwarf chameleon, or uMlalazi dwarf chameleon, is endemic to KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.

children.name: Bradypodion ventrale
children.description: Bradypodion ventrale, the southern dwarf chameleon, occurs in the Eastern Cape, South Africa.

children.name: Rhampholeon
children.description: Rhampholeon — a genus of chameleons in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon acuminatus
children.description: Rhampholeon acuminatus, also known commonly as the Nguru pygmy chameleon, is a species of chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon beraduccii
children.description: Rhampholeon beraduccii, also known commonly as Beraducci's pygmy chameleon or the Mahenge pygmy chameleon, is a species of lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon boulengeri
children.description: Rhampholeon boulengeri, also known commonly as Boulenger's pygmy chameleon, is a species of lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon bruessoworum
children.description: Rhampholeon bruessoworum, the Mount Inago pygmy chameleon, is a small species of chameleon endemic to Mozambique.

children.name: Rhampholeon chapmanorum
children.description: Rhampholeon chapmanorum, also known commonly as Chapmans' pygmy chameleon, is a species of terrestrial pygmy chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon gorongosae
children.description: Rhampholeon gorongosae, the Mount Gorongosa pygmy chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Mozambique.

children.name: Rhampholeon hattinghi
children.description: Rhampholeon hattinghi is a species of chameleon endemic to the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

children.name: Rhampholeon maspictus
children.description: Rhampholeon maspictus, the Mount Mabu pygmy chameleon, is a small native species of chameleon endemic to the tropical rainforests atop Mount Mabu in Zambezia, Mozambique.

children.name: Rhampholeon moyeri
children.description: Rhampholeon moyeri, also known commonly as Moyer's pygmy chameleon and the Udzungwa pygmy chameleon, is a species of lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Rhampholeon nchisiensis
children.description: Rhampholeon nchisiensis, the South African stumptail chameleon or Nchisi pygmy chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Malawi and Tanzania.

children.name: Rhampholeon nebulauctor
children.description: Rhampholeon nebulauctor, the Mount Chiperone pygmy chameleon, is a small species of chameleon.

children.name: Rhampholeon platyceps
children.description: Rhampholeon platyceps, the Mount Mulanje pygmy chameleon or Malawi stumptail chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Malawi and Mozambique.

children.name: Rhampholeon spectrum
children.description: Category:Taxa named by Reinhold Wilhelm Buchholz.

children.name: Rhampholeon temporalis
children.description: Rhampholeon temporalis, the Usambara stumptail chameleon or East Usambara pygmy chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Tanzania.

children.name: Rhampholeon uluguruensis
children.description: Rhampholeon uluguruensis, also known commonly as the Uluguru pygmy chameleon, is a small species of chameleon in the family Chamaeleonidae, endemic to Tanzania.

children.name: Rhampholeon viridis
children.description: Rhampholeon viridis, the green pygmy chameleon, is a species of chameleons endemic to Tanzania.

children.description: Rieppeleon brevicaudatus, commonly known as the bearded leaf chameleon or bearded pygmy chameleon, is a chameleon originating from the eastern Usambara and Uluguru Mountains in northeastern Tanzania and Kenya.

children.description: Brookesia confidens, also known as the leaf chameleon, is one of the world's smallest species of chameleons.

children.description: Brookesia exarmata, also known as the dwarf chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Brookesia griveaudi
children.description: Brookesia griveaudi, commonly known as the Marojejy leaf chameleon, is a species of chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Brookesia lambertoni
children.description: Brookesia lambertoni, commonly known as the Fito leaf chameleon, is a species of chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.description: Brookesia lineata, also commonly known as the lined leaf chameleon, is a species of chameleon that is endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Brookesia micra
children.description: Brookesia micra, also known as the Nosy Hara leaf chameleon is a species of chameleons from the islet of Nosy Hara in Antsiranana, Madagascar.

children.name: Brookesia minima
children.description: Brookesia minima, (common names of which include the dwarf chameleon, the Madagascar dwarf chameleon, the minute leaf chameleon, and the Nosy Be pygmy leaf chameleon), is a diminutive chameleon that was regarded as the smallest lizard of the Chamaeleonidae until a smaller species, Brookesia nana, was described in 2021.

children.name: Brookesia perarmata
children.description: The Antsingy leaf chameleon is a species of lizards in the family Chamaeleonidae. The species is also referred to as Armoured leaf chameleon.

children.name: Brookesia peyrierasi
children.description: Brookesia peyrierasi is a species of diminutive chameleon, a lizard in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Brookesia ramanantsoai
children.description: Brookesia ramanantsoai is a species of chameleon.

children.name: Brookesia stumpffi
children.description: Brookesia stumpffi, also known as the plated leaf chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in some parts of Madagascar.

children.name: Brookesia therezieni

children.name: Furcifer cephalolepis

children.name: Furcifer major
children.description: Furcifer major, the southern carpet chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in various dry habitats of southern Madagascar.

children.name: Furcifer viridis

children.name: Trioceros incornutus
children.description: Trioceros incornutus, the Ukinga hornless chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Tanzania.

children.name: Trioceros ituriensis
children.description: Trioceros ituriensis, the Ituri forest chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Democratic Republic of the Congo and Kenya.

children.description: Trioceros kinangopensis, the Aberdare Mountains dwarf chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Kenya.

children.name: Trioceros kinetensis
children.description: Trioceros kinetensis, or the Mount Kineti chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in South Sudan.

children.name: Trioceros marsabitensis
children.description: Trioceros marsabitensis, Tilbury's chameleon, Mount Marsabit chameleon, or Mount Marsabit one-horned chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Kenya.

children.name: Trioceros montium

children.name: Trioceros narraioca
children.description: Trioceros narraioca, the Mount Kulal chameleon or Mount Kulal stump-nosed chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Kenya.

children.name: Trioceros ntunte
children.description: Trioceros ntunte, the Mount Nyiru chameleon or Nyiru montane chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Kenya.

children.name: Trioceros nyirit
children.description: Trioceros nyirit, the Mount Mtelo stump-nosed chameleon or Pokot chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Kenya.

children.name: Trioceros perreti
children.description: Trioceros perreti, Perret's chameleon or Perret's montane chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Cameroon.

children.name: Trioceros pfefferi
children.description: Trioceros pfefferi, Pfeffer's chameleon or the Bakossi two-horned chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Cameroon.

children.name: Trioceros schoutedeni
children.description: Trioceros schoutedeni, Schouteden's montane dwarf chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Rwanda and Democratic Republic of the Congo.

children.name: Trioceros serratus
children.description: Trioceros serratus is a species of chameleon found in Cameroon.

children.name: Trioceros sternfeldi
children.description: Trioceros sternfeldi, the Crater Highlands side-striped chameleon or Tanzanian montane dwarf chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Tanzania.

children.name: Trioceros tempeli
children.description: Trioceros tempeli, the Tanzania mountain chameleon or Udzungwa double-bearded chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Tanzania.

children.name: Trioceros werneri
children.description: Trioceros werneri, the Wemer's chameleon or Wemer's three-horned chameleon, is a species of chameleon that is endemic to forests and nearby gardens at altitudes of in the Eastern Arc Mountains of Tanzania.

children.name: Trioceros wiedersheimi
children.description: Trioceros wiedersheimi, the Mount Lefo chameleon or Wiedersheim's montane chameleon, is a species of chameleon found in Cameroon and Nigeria.

children.description: Palleon — a genus of chameleons in the family Chamaeleonidae.

children.name: Palleon nasus
children.description: Palleon nasus, commonly known as the elongate leaf chameleon, is a species of chameleon endemic to Madagascar.

children.name: Bradypus
children.description: Bradypus — a genus of chameleons.
